form.layout: =========>baseInfo[基本信息]====== lineNo[行号] expenseType[费用类型] projectId[项目] costCenterId[成本中心] subjectId[科目ID] subjectCode[科目编码] =========>amount[金额信息]====== amountWithoutTax[金额(不含税)] taxRate[税率(%)] taxAmount[税额] amountWithTax[金额(含税)] =========>reference[业务关联]====== claimId[报销单ID] =========^audit[审计信息]========= remark[备注] createdBy[创建人] createTime[创建时间] updatedBy[修改人] updateTime[修改时间]

=========>baseInfo[基本信息]====== lineNo[行号] expenseType[费用类型] projectId[项目] costCenterId[成本中心] subjectId[科目ID] subjectCode[科目编码] =========>amount[金额信息]====== amountWithoutTax[金额(不含税)] taxRate[税率(%)] taxAmount[税额] amountWithTax[金额(含税)] =========>reference[业务关联]====== claimId[报销单ID] remark[备注](2)

form.title: 查询条件
form.layout: lineNo[行号] claimId[报销单ID] expenseType[费用类型] subjectCode[科目编码] amountWithTax[金额(含税)]
